'use strict'; // eslint-disable-next-line consistent-return module.exports = /** @type {(t: import('tape').Test) => void | false} */ function runSymbolTests(t) { t.equal(typeof Symbol, 'function', 'global Symbol is a function'); t.ok(Symbol.toStringTag, 'Symbol.toStringTag exists'); if (typeof Symbol !== 'function' || !Symbol.toStringTag) { return false; } /** @type {{ [Symbol.toStringTag]?: 'test'}} */ var obj = {}; obj[Symbol.toStringTag] = 'test'; t.equal(Object.prototype.toString.call(obj), '[object test]'); };
